nodes.name: Divider.svelte
nodes.summary: A simple UI component that renders a styled horizontal rule (<hr>) with color variants (green, amber, red, purple, blue, teal, draco) and configurable spacing. Uses Svelte 5 runes for props.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 5 with $props() rune. No script imports — purely presentational.

nodes.name: index.ts (ui barrel)
nodes.summary: Barrel re-export file for the shared UI component library. Exports Card, Badge, Button, Stat, Section, Divider, and Panel as named exports from their respective .svelte files.
nodes.languageNotes: Pure re-export module — no logic, just convenience imports.

nodes.name: Panel.svelte
nodes.summary: A styled panel container component with color variants and optional header/body slots. Renders a gradient background card with configurable padding and rounded corners.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 5 with $props() rune. Imports Snippet type from 'svelte' for slot rendering.

nodes.name: Section.svelte
nodes.summary: A section container with an optional title header and body slot. Supports multiple color variants including 'draco', gap sizes, and renders a bordered card with uppercase label styling.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 5 with $props() rune. Imports Snippet type from 'svelte'.

nodes.name: Stat.svelte
nodes.summary: A key-value stat display component showing a label and value (or slot content) side-by-side. Supports color variants, three sizes (sm/md/lg), and an optional hover state.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 5 with $props() rune. Imports Snippet type from 'svelte'.

nodes.name: uiConstants.ts
nodes.summary: Defines constant lookup maps for UI display: UI_COLORS (hex colors for damage types, tag groups, source types, enchant rarities, and negative stats), SOURCE_LABELS (human-readable source names), STAT_LABELS, and TAG_LABELS.
nodes.languageNotes: Pure constant definitions using 'as const' assertions. No imports.

nodes.name: utils.ts
nodes.summary: Pure utility functions for the damage calculator: roundMultiplier and calcWardingDebuffMultiplier for game math, highlightTextParts for search query highlighting with HTML escaping, and calcProcChance for computing proc probability with different scaling types.
nodes.languageNotes: Imports ProcCoefficient and ProcScalingType from ./types. Exports roundMultiplier, calcWardingDebuffMultiplier, highlightTextParts, and calcProcChance.

nodes.name: main.ts
nodes.summary: Application entry point. Mounts the Svelte App component to the #app DOM element, imports global CSS, and injects Vercel analytics.
nodes.languageNotes: Imports mount from 'svelte' (Svelte 5 API), App from ./App.svelte, ./app.css, and inject from @vercel/analytics.

nodes.name: ModalSearchHeader.svelte
nodes.summary: A composite modal header component that composes a title, search input with suggestions dropdown, tag filter, stat/weapon-stat filter, and optional sort buttons (Highest/Most Effective/Brawny). Acts as a reusable filter bar for modal dialogs.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 2 style (export let, createEventDispatcher). Imports SuggestDrop, TagFilter, StatFilter, and WeaponStatFilter components. Dispatches events: select, toggle, clear, change, weaponStatFilterChange.

nodes.name: MountIcon.svelte
nodes.summary: An inline SVG icon component depicting a mount (horse/creature) silhouette with a blue-to-cyan gradient fill. Takes a configurable size prop.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 2 style (export let). No imports. Uses a unique gradient ID per instance via Math.random().

nodes.name: ScalingBreakdownRow.svelte
nodes.summary: Renders a single row in the weapon scaling breakdown display, showing damage type color dot, scaling value, boost percentage, and resulting contribution as a grid layout with math operators (× and =).
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 2 style. Imports roundMultiplier from ./lib/utils and PERCENT_STATS from ./lib/types. Uses reactive $: to detect percentage stats.

nodes.name: StatFilter.svelte
nodes.summary: A collapsible stat filter panel for armor/infusion modals. Organizes stats into positive and negative tabs (Boost, Defense, Utility groups), supports include/exclude/Off tri-state filtering via stat chips, and emits change events with the active filter map and sort mode.

nodes.name: SuggestDrop.svelte
nodes.summary: An autocomplete suggestions dropdown that renders a list of name/perk suggestions with highlighted query matches. Each item shows a type badge and label, and dispatches a 'select' event on mousedown.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 2 style. Imports createEventDispatcher from 'svelte' and highlightTextParts from ./lib/utils.

nodes.name: TagFilter.svelte
nodes.summary: A collapsible tag filter panel organized into groups (Combat, Support, Status, Weapon Art/Rune, Special). Supports multi-select toggling, summary chips in the header bar, and clear-all functionality. Used in modal search headers.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 2 style. Imports svelte/transition (slide), createEventDispatcher and tick from 'svelte', UI_COLORS from ./lib/uiConstants, and Badge from ./lib/ui/Badge.svelte.

nodes.name: WeaponStatFilter.svelte
nodes.summary: A collapsible weapon-specific stat filter panel with three groups: Damage Type (true/physical/magic/etc.), Scaling (dexterity/elemental), and Boost/Stats. Exposes a matchesFilter() method and emits change events with the active filter map.
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 2 style with export let and exported method (matchesFilter). Imports from svelte/transition (slide), ./lib/stats/elementalBoosts, ./lib/stats/filterActions, ./lib/uiConstants, ./lib/StatFilterShared.svelte, ./lib/ui/Badge.svelte, ./lib/ui/Button.svelte.

nodes.name: WeaponStatsDisplay.svelte
nodes.summary: Displays a weapon's stats split into three labeled groups (Dmg Type, Scaling, Stats) as colored pill badges. Automatically categorizes stats by their key suffix (Type, Scaling, or other).
nodes.languageNotes: Svelte 2 style. No project imports — purely self-contained with local helper functions for formatting.

nodes.name: vite.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vite build configuration for the voxlblade-builder project. Configures the Svelte plugin, VitePWA with autoUpdate service worker, workbox caching strategies, and a configurable base path for deployment.
nodes.languageNotes: Imports defineConfig from 'vite', svelte from '@sveltejs/vite-plugin-svelte', VitePWA from 'vite-plugin-pwa'. No project-internal imports.

edges.label: re-exports default as Card (external to batch)
re-exports default as Badge (external to batch)
re-exports default as Button (external to batch)
